_comment: 8 worked examples — one per op. Each is a valid input file you'd pass to the matching scripts/<op>.sh. Pick the one matching your write op, copy, edit values, save, then: bash ~/.code_puppy/skills/executing-plans/scripts/<op>.sh path/to/input.json

run_step__shell_command._why: PREFERRED PATH for shell-based steps. Bundles start+exec+complete with auto-captured log_context. Eliminates the 'forgot to pass log_context' footgun the same way migration 006 eliminated 'forgot to call finish-plan'.

run_step__with_summary._why: Override the auto-generated summary with a curated one-liner.
run_step__with_summary.summary: Migrated DB to head: adds Steps.is_review + idx_steps_plan_review.

start_step__sub_agent.agent_input: Refactor app/auth/oauth.py: extract OAuthClient.fetch_token into a separate token_service module. Preserve public API. Run pytest after.

complete_step__with_summary.summary: Read app/health.py + identified 3 singletons: db_session, worker_registry, disk_monitor. Mapped to 4 probe functions for deep_health().

complete_step__sub_agent_with_output.summary: Sub-agent extracted token_service module + 6 tests pass + zero public-API regression
complete_step__sub_agent_with_output.agent_output: Created app/auth/token_service.py with TokenService class. OAuthClient now delegates fetch_token() to it. tests/test_oauth.py and tests/test_token_service.py both green. No callers broken.

complete_step__with_inline_log._why: Use inline log_context (Bug 2 fix) when you have raw output ready at completion time — saves a separate append-log call and ensures the log isn't forgotten. Same `--- ts ---` delimiter as append-log so dashboard counters keep working.
complete_step__with_inline_log.summary: deep_health endpoint added; all 4 probes return correct ProbeResult; pytest green
complete_step__with_inline_log.log_context:
$ pytest tests/test_deep_health.py -v
tests/test_deep_health.py::test_all_healthy PASSED
tests/test_deep_health.py::test_db_unreachable PASSED
tests/test_deep_health.py::test_disk_full PASSED
tests/test_deep_health.py::test_worker_unresponsive PASSED
4 passed in 0.18s

fail_step.reason: pytest tests/test_deep_health.py::test_db_unreachable_returns_503 failed — mock raises wrong exception type. Need to revisit ProbeResult contract.

deviate.justification: Implementation revealed need for a shared ProbeResult contract before the 4 probes can be written independently — extracting it as a sub-step.
sub_steps: TEST: tests/test_probe_result.py — ProbeResult dataclass: status field accepts 'ok'/'warn'/'down', extra dict carries arbitrary metadata, .to_json() serializes correctly
CODE: app/health/probe_result.py — ProbeResult dataclass with status + extra + to_json
CODE: refactor 4 probe functions to return ProbeResult instead of bare dicts

record_skill__deferred_load.name: systematic-debugging
record_skill__deferred_load.reason: Test failure at step E surfaced — activating systematic-debugging to root-cause before proceeding
